base_close_views.framing_contract: upper half fills the frame while the closure, shoulder, and upper label remain complete and uncropped
upper right half fills the frame while closure profile, shoulder depth, and side label edge remain complete
upper back half fills the frame while the closure, shoulder, and upper compliance area remain complete
upper left half fills the frame while closure profile, shoulder depth, and side label edge remain complete
lower front half fills the frame while the full front label, base edge, and fill boundary remain complete
lower right half fills the frame while side depth, seam, base edge, and label wrap remain complete
lower back half fills the frame while the full back label, codes, batch zone, and base edge remain complete
lower left half fills the frame while side depth, seam, base edge, and label wrap remain complete

DETAIL_FRONT_LABEL.framing_contract: front label plate alone fills the evidence frame without clipping any printed boundary
DETAIL_FRONT_LABEL.focus_contract: all front-label product-native copy and artwork edges remain critically sharp

DETAIL_BACK_LABEL.framing_contract: back label plate alone fills the evidence frame without clipping any printed boundary
DETAIL_BACK_LABEL.focus_contract: all back-label product-native copy and artwork edges remain critically sharp

DETAIL_LEFT_LABEL_SEAM.framing_contract: left label edge and seam interface fill the frame with both adjoining materials visible
DETAIL_LEFT_LABEL_SEAM.focus_contract: seam, adhesion edge, wall transition, and print registration remain sharp

DETAIL_RIGHT_LABEL_SEAM.framing_contract: right label edge and seam interface fill the frame with both adjoining materials visible
DETAIL_RIGHT_LABEL_SEAM.focus_contract: seam, adhesion edge, wall transition, and print registration remain sharp

DETAIL_LOGO_HERO_COPY.framing_contract: brand logo and hero-copy region fill the evidence frame with the complete native graphic boundary
DETAIL_LOGO_HERO_COPY.focus_contract: logo geometry and every hero-copy character remain critically sharp

DETAIL_CAPACITY_AND_SPEC.framing_contract: capacity and specification region fill the evidence frame without neighboring pseudo-copy
DETAIL_CAPACITY_AND_SPEC.focus_contract: all numerals, punctuation, and units remain critically sharp

DETAIL_BATCH_DATE_LOT.framing_contract: batch, date, and lot region fill the evidence frame without clipping variable-instance copy
DETAIL_BATCH_DATE_LOT.focus_contract: all batch/date/lot characters and separators remain critically sharp

DETAIL_BARCODE_QR_CERTIFICATION.framing_contract: code and certification region fills the evidence frame with complete quiet zones and mark boundaries
DETAIL_BARCODE_QR_CERTIFICATION.focus_contract: barcode bars, QR modules, certification marks, and quiet zones remain critically sharp

DETAIL_CLOSURE_FRONT.framing_contract: closure front and actuator interface fill the frame while remaining attached to the neck
DETAIL_CLOSURE_FRONT.focus_contract: closure silhouette, actuator face, collar interface, and parting lines remain sharp

DETAIL_CLOSURE_SIDE.framing_contract: closure side profile and nozzle projection fill the frame while remaining attached to the neck
DETAIL_CLOSURE_SIDE.focus_contract: side profile, nozzle vector, actuator travel interface, and collar edge remain sharp

DETAIL_CLOSURE_TOP.framing_contract: true top-down closure footprint fills the frame with actuator and nozzle orientation visible
DETAIL_CLOSURE_TOP.focus_contract: top footprint, nozzle aperture direction, actuator boundary, and collar concentricity remain sharp

DETAIL_NECK_COLLAR_SHOULDER.framing_contract: neck, collar, and two shoulder transitions fill the frame as one connected interface
DETAIL_NECK_COLLAR_SHOULDER.focus_contract: thread/collar geometry, shoulder corners, wall thickness, and assembly seams remain sharp

DETAIL_SIDE_WALL_AND_MOLD_SEAM.framing_contract: side-wall depth and mold seam fill the frame with front/back depth cues retained
DETAIL_SIDE_WALL_AND_MOLD_SEAM.focus_contract: mold seam, wall profile, panel transition, and depth ratio remain sharp

DETAIL_BASE_EDGE.framing_contract: low-angle base edge and wall-to-base transition fill the frame without hiding the contact profile
DETAIL_BASE_EDGE.focus_contract: base rim, thick-wall transition, mold marks, and contact edge remain sharp

DETAIL_TRUE_BOTTOM.framing_contract: true bottom footprint fills the frame with every base mark and perimeter edge visible
DETAIL_TRUE_BOTTOM.focus_contract: bottom geometry, stamp zone, mold code, and full perimeter remain sharp

DETAIL_WALL_THICKNESS_REFRACTION.framing_contract: transparent wall edge and refraction boundary fill the frame with front and rear interfaces separable
DETAIL_WALL_THICKNESS_REFRACTION.focus_contract: wall thickness, refraction boundary, caustic edge, and internal/external layer order remain sharp

DETAIL_REAR_SHOWTHROUGH_LAYERING.framing_contract: front wall, liquid, rear wall, and rear show-through occupy one frame with physical layer order visible
DETAIL_REAR_SHOWTHROUGH_LAYERING.focus_contract: direct front layer and mirrored/refracted rear layer remain optically distinguishable

DETAIL_CONTENT_COLOR_TRANSPARENCY.framing_contract: content color and transmission occupy the frame with wall and air references retained
DETAIL_CONTENT_COLOR_TRANSPARENCY.focus_contract: content hue, density, transparency, bubbles, and attenuation remain source-bound

DETAIL_NOZZLE_APERTURE.framing_contract: nozzle tip and aperture fill the frame while the product-space nozzle vector remains visible
DETAIL_NOZZLE_APERTURE.focus_contract: aperture geometry, tip thickness, seam, and orientation remain sharp

DETAIL_ACTUATOR_STEM_COLLAR.framing_contract: actuator, stem, and collar assembly fill the frame as one connected mechanism
DETAIL_ACTUATOR_STEM_COLLAR.focus_contract: stem alignment, collar gap, actuator seat, and assembly interfaces remain sharp

DETAIL_FILL_LINE_AIR_LAYER.framing_contract: fill line and air layer span the frame with bottle vertical and world-horizontal references retained
DETAIL_FILL_LINE_AIR_LAYER.focus_contract: meniscus, fill boundary, air gap, and wall refraction remain sharp

DETAIL_INTERNAL_TUBE_START_MIDDLE_END.framing_contract: dip-tube start, middle path, and end remain simultaneously visible as one connected topology
DETAIL_INTERNAL_TUBE_START_MIDDLE_END.focus_contract: tube connection, uninterrupted centerline, distal end, and refraction remain sharp

DETAIL_EMBOSSING_REGISTRATION.framing_contract: embossed or debossed motif and its registered surface context fill the frame
DETAIL_EMBOSSING_REGISTRATION.focus_contract: relief edges, registration, depth, and highlight/shadow response remain sharp

DETAIL_PRINT_MATERIAL_BOUNDARY.framing_contract: print, foil, or reflective-material boundary fills the frame with substrate on both sides visible
DETAIL_PRINT_MATERIAL_BOUNDARY.focus_contract: ink/foil edge, substrate texture, reflectivity transition, and registration remain sharp

DETAIL_WRAP_CONTINUITY_AND_SEAM.framing_contract: wrap-label continuation and physical seam fill the frame with both adjoining panels visible
DETAIL_WRAP_CONTINUITY_AND_SEAM.focus_contract: copy/artwork continuation, overlap, seam position, and adhesion edge remain sharp

DETAIL_TOP_FLAP.framing_contract: top flap system fills the true top-down frame with every fold and closure edge visible
DETAIL_TOP_FLAP.focus_contract: flap outline, fold lines, tuck geometry, and adhesive interfaces remain sharp

DETAIL_BOTTOM_FLAP.framing_contract: bottom flap system fills the true bottom-up frame with every fold and closure edge visible
DETAIL_BOTTOM_FLAP.focus_contract: flap outline, fold lines, lock geometry, and adhesive interfaces remain sharp

DETAIL_GLUE_SEAM.framing_contract: carton glue seam and adjoining panels fill the frame
DETAIL_GLUE_SEAM.focus_contract: seam line, overlap width, fold alignment, and print registration remain sharp

DETAIL_LEFT_GUSSET.framing_contract: left gusset fills the frame in the frozen product state
DETAIL_LEFT_GUSSET.focus_contract: gusset folds, seals, panel transition, and deformation state remain sharp

DETAIL_RIGHT_GUSSET.framing_contract: right gusset fills the frame in the frozen product state
DETAIL_RIGHT_GUSSET.focus_contract: gusset folds, seals, panel transition, and deformation state remain sharp

DETAIL_BOTTOM_GUSSET.framing_contract: bottom gusset fills the true bottom frame in the frozen product state
DETAIL_BOTTOM_GUSSET.focus_contract: gusset footprint, folds, seals, and expansion state remain sharp

DETAIL_TOP_SEAL.framing_contract: top seal or spout interface fills the frame with adjoining pouch panels visible
DETAIL_TOP_SEAL.focus_contract: seal width, tear/notch geometry, spout interface, and fold state remain sharp

DETAIL_TAIL_CRIMP.framing_contract: tube tail crimp fills the frame with both side edges and seal pattern visible
DETAIL_TAIL_CRIMP.focus_contract: crimp profile, seal ridges, fold state, and printed registration remain sharp

DETAIL_CAP_AND_NOZZLE.framing_contract: tube cap and nozzle interface fill the frame in the frozen open or closed state
DETAIL_CAP_AND_NOZZLE.focus_contract: cap fit, nozzle aperture, thread/hinge geometry, and state remain sharp

dynamic_region_detail_contract.framing_contract: one exact source region fills the evidence frame; do not merge another physical region into this master
dynamic_region_detail_contract.focus_contract: all product-native text lines, code modules, and graphic edges owned by this region remain independently readable
